violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (mixing bowl) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to be washed/sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025
Inspector observed no lactic acid sanitizer available at 3 bay sink. Establishment not currently in use. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025
Handwashing sink is lacking signage. A sign or poster must be available to notify food employees of handwashing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
